title: Kohtla-Järve, Ida-Viru County — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kohtla-Järve, Ida-Viru County: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kohtla-Järve is a city in Ida-Viru County with a population of 33,000. A city in northeastern Estonia, the center of the country’s oil shale mining industry, with a predominantly Russian-speaking population and a Soviet-era urban landscape.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
